CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "execution_entity" ("id" integer PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, "workflowId" varchar(36) NOT NULL, "finished" boolean NOT NULL, "mode" varchar NOT NULL, "retryOf" varchar, "retrySuccessId" varchar, "startedAt" datetime, "stoppedAt" datetime, "waitTill" datetime, "status" varchar NOT NULL, "deletedAt" datetime(3), "createdAt" datetime(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT (STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%f', 'NOW')), "storedAt" VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'db' CHECK("storedAt" IN ('db', 'fs', 's3')), CONSTRAINT "FK_c4d999a5e90784e8caccf5589de" FOREIGN KEY ("workflowId") REFERENCES "workflow_entity" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION);
CREATE INDEX "IDX_execution_entity_stoppedAt" ON "execution_entity" ("stoppedAt") ;
CREATE INDEX "IDX_execution_entity_deletedAt" ON "execution_entity" ("deletedAt") ;
